title: Inside OAuth App: Risks, Real Attacks, and How Microsoft Defender Shuts Them Down
description:
Product Manager Kijo Girardi and Senior Security Researcher Shaleen Dev P.K. break down what OAuth apps really are - and their related risky relationship with attackers. Tune in to walk through the threat landscape, learn how Microsoft XDR detects suspicious OAuth activity, and how attack disruption automatically contains malicious app scenarios in real time. Don't miss the bonus practical hunting query to help you track OAuth app behavior and spot trouble before it spreads.
